title: phymatopteris suboxyloba
intro: Phymatopteris suboxyloba, also known as the spiny fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to parts of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating a range of health issues. The spiny fern has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the spiny fern is often dried and made into tea or infusions, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures or capsules.
